channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10834] sanity cleanup_77c() defect: rm: cannot remove 'mpich2': Is a directory rm: cannot remove 'openmpi': Is a directory
item.description:
{color:#333333}== sanity test 77c: checksum error on client read with debug ========================================= 20:18:42 (1521577122){color}
 

{color:#4d4d4d}8+0 records in{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8+0 records out{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8388608 bytes (8.4 MB) copied, 0.615308 s, 13.6 MB/s{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8+0 records in{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8+0 records out{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8388608 bytes (8.4 MB) copied, 0.150707 s, 55.7 MB/s{color}

 

{color:#ff0000}OSS do not support bulk pages dump upon error{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=1{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=1{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}fail_loc=0x80000408{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8+0 records in{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8+0 records out{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}8388608 bytes (8.4 MB) copied, 1.21454 s, 6.9 MB/s{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}fail_loc=0{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d} SKIP: sanity test_77c No need to check cksum dump on OSS{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...done.{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}20:18:46 (1521577126) waiting for fre0117 network 5 secs ...{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}20:18:46 (1521577126) network interface is UP{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}20:18:47 (1521577127) waiting for fre0118 network 5 secs ...{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}20:18:47 (1521577127) network interface is UP{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}20:18:47 (1521577127) waiting for fre0120 network 5 secs ...{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}20:18:47 (1521577127) network interface is UP{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=0{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=0{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}obdfilter.lustre-OST0000.checksum_dump=0{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}obdfilter.lustre-OST0001.checksum_dump=0{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}rm: cannot remove 'mpich2': Is a directory{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}rm: cannot remove 'openmpi': Is a directory{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}rm: cannot remove 'test-env': Is a directory{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}test_77c returned 1{color}

 

{color:#4d4d4d}FAIL 77c (5s){color}
item.summary: sanity cleanup_77c() defect: rm: cannot remove 'mpich2': Is a directory rm: cannot remove 'openmpi': Is a directory

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/31918/
Subject: LU-10834 tests: fix cleanup_77c() defect
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 5fc3c6a4fadcadb4838eedc39695b41984c7c0fa

Elena Gryaznova (c17455@cray.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31918
Subject: LU-10834 tests: fix cleanup_77c() defect
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1e3f791ac030a864125540c1f9386872d396954a

Sorry for not readable description, stdout :

== sanity test 77c: checksum error on client read with debug ========================================= 20:18:42 (1521577122)

8+0 records in

8+0 records out

8388608 bytes (8.4 MB) copied, 0.615308 s, 13.6 MB/s

8+0 records in

8+0 records out

8388608 bytes (8.4 MB) copied, 0.150707 s, 55.7 MB/s

OSS do not support bulk pages dump upon error

osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=1

osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=1

fail_loc=0x80000408

8+0 records in

8+0 records out

8388608 bytes (8.4 MB) copied, 1.21454 s, 6.9 MB/s

fail_loc=0

 

 SKIP: sanity test_77c No need to check cksum dump on OSS

Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...done.

20:18:46 (1521577126) waiting for fre0117 network 5 secs ...

20:18:46 (1521577126) network interface is UP

20:18:47 (1521577127) waiting for fre0118 network 5 secs ...

20:18:47 (1521577127) network interface is UP

20:18:47 (1521577127) network interface is UP

osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=0

osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff880135787000.checksum_dump=0

obdfilter.lustre-OST0000.checksum_dump=0

obdfilter.lustre-OST0001.checksum_dump=0

rm: cannot remove 'mpich2': Is a directory

rm: cannot remove 'openmpi': Is a directory

rm: cannot remove 'test-env': Is a directory

test_77c returned 1

FAIL 77c (5s)
